person.title: Placeholder Person
person.body: This is placeholder content for the Thresholds day, included to prove that the app advances through a sequence of days one at a time. It is not researched or sourced to the editorial charter's standard and should be replaced before this day is shown to a real reader. Real content here would present a single documented human life that embodies the theme of Thresholds, shown with its highs and its lows, in roughly eighty to one hundred and thirty calm, concrete words, with every claim resting on a primary or authoritative secondary source.
